title: kyllinga microcristata
intro: Kyllinga microcristata, also known as Grass-like Cyperus, is a plant species from the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Kyllinga microcristata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its roots are often dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine.
